heading: Considerations
body:
To run [$lookup](manual/reference/operator/aggregation/lookup) query with [$search](pipe.$search), your
cluster must run MongoDB v6.0 or later. To upgrade your MongoDB version,
see [upgrade your cluster to MongoDB 8.0](upgrade-major-MongoDB-version).

[$lookup](manual/reference/operator/aggregation/lookup) queries are less performant because MongoDB Search
does a full document lookup on the database for each document in the
collection.

To learn how to improve the performance of `$lookup` queries, see
[Reduce $lookup Operations](embedded-documents-arrays-anti-pattern).
